subject: (no subject)
body:
Dear Jeffrey,

 

I warmly thank you for your interest regarding my file.

 

To respond to your question relating to the banks, we already have borrowed 13 millions euros and the French Banks do not like to grant a loan if they are not guarantee in first rank.

Of course, it would be possible to find a French bank to be funded by, but it would take a lot of time, and it would be very costly and disadvantageous.

 

As you asked me yesterday evening, our project to use the 4 millions euros is as follows:

 

You will find attached a board of expenses for all the investments which we must make very quickly to allow us to concretize our technological advance.

 

This board of expenses describes the technical developments to do.

It is necessary to add to this board the expenses for the deposit of the new patents, and the difference between the granted amount and the expenses announced in the board will be used to fund the maintenance of the current assets (team of researchers, payment of the licenses, maintenance of the patents, helps with the drafting of the patents), because our incomes from post-production for feature films are not sufficient to satisfy these needs.

 

Of course, this operation will cost us more than 4 millions euros, and while we are waiting to be really operational on the mass market, we are ready for the digital signage market which is a market which can be very important and which will allow to have very important incomes during the necessary time for the development.

 

Indeed we should have the first orders for digital signage before the end of the year, and we are very close to reach an agreement with the followings firms:

 

- Marionnaud, where we have already made a test during the last six months, a decision should be take on November, 22. (Attached is the project approved by Marrionaud)

- Clear Channel, we have worked with them during the last summer to integrate our screens into a special furniture we carried out with them (attached is the picture of the furniture).

- Paris-Expo: is about to join our project and should validate our file.(attached is the project approved by Paris Expo)

- Louis Vuitton where we already made a test, is studying our file; we are waiting for their response after we sent them a quotation (attached is the quotation).

 

I remain at your disposal should you need any further information.

 

 

Very truly yours,

 

 

Armand

(+ 33 6 22 52 07 01)

 



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
body_html:
Dear Jeffrey,

 

I warmly thank you for your interest regarding my file.

 

To respond to your question relating to the banks, we already have borrowed 13 millions euros and the French Banks do not like to grant a loan if they are not guarantee in first rank.

Of course, it would be possible to find a French bank to be funded by, but it would take a lot of time, and it would be very costly and disadvantageous.

 

As you asked me yesterday evening, our project to use the 4 millions euros is as follows:

 

You will find attached a board of expenses for all the investments which we must make very quickly to allow us to concretize our technological advance.

 

This board of expenses describes the technical developments to do.

It is necessary to add to this board the expenses for the deposit of the new patents, and the difference between the granted amount and the expenses announced in the board will be used to fund the maintenance of the current assets (team of researchers, payment of the licenses, maintenance of the patents, helps with the drafting of the patents), because our incomes from post-production for feature films are not sufficient to satisfy these needs.

 

Of course, this operation will cost us more than 4 millions euros, and while we are waiting to be really operational on the mass market, we are ready for the digital signage market which is a market which can be very important and which will allow to have very important incomes during the necessary time for the development.

 

Indeed we should have the first orders for digital signage before the end of the year, and we are very close to reach an agreement with the followings firms:

 

- Marionnaud, where we have already made a test during the last six months, a decision should be take on November, 22. (Attached is the project approved by Marrionaud)

- Clear Channel, we have worked with them during the last summer to integrate our screens into a special furniture we carried out with them (attached is the picture of the furniture).

- Paris-Expo: is about to join our project and should validate our file.(attached is the project approved by Paris Expo)

- Louis Vuitton where we already made a test, is studying our file; we are waiting for their response after we sent them a quotation (attached is the quotation).

 

I remain at your disposal should you need any further information.

 

 

Very truly yours,

 

 

Armand

(+ 33 6 22 52 07 01)
